module_info.docstring:
Tests for broadcast topic threads (bd-26w).

Covers:
- Broadcast expansion to all agents (excluding sender)
- Broadcast with explicit recipients errors
- Broadcast respects contact_policy (block_all skipped)
- Topic field stored in messages
- Topic filtering in fetch_inbox
- fetch_topic tool
- Broadcast with topic combined
- Empty project broadcast (no recipients)

functions.name: _get_data
functions.docstring: Extract data dict from tool result (dict-returning tools like send_message).

functions.name: _get_list
functions.docstring:
Extract list data from tool result (list-returning tools like fetch_inbox).

Uses structured_content["result"] which returns plain dicts,
unlike result.data which returns pydantic Root objects.

functions.name: _setup_project_with_agents
functions.docstring: Register `count` agents in the project and return their names.

functions.name: test_broadcast_expands_to_all_agents
functions.docstring: broadcast=true with empty 'to' should deliver to all agents except sender.

functions.name: test_broadcast_with_explicit_recipients_errors
functions.docstring: broadcast=true with non-empty 'to' should raise an error.

functions.name: test_broadcast_excludes_sender
functions.docstring: Sender should never appear in their own broadcast recipient list.

functions.name: test_broadcast_respects_block_all_policy
functions.docstring: Agents with contact_policy=block_all should be excluded from broadcasts.

functions.name: test_broadcast_empty_project
functions.docstring: Broadcast with only sender registered should produce empty recipients.

functions.name: test_topic_stored_in_message
functions.docstring: Message with topic param should have topic field in DB and payload.

functions.name: test_topic_filtering_inbox
functions.docstring: fetch_inbox with topic filter returns only matching messages.

functions.name: test_topic_filtering_empty
functions.docstring: fetch_inbox with non-existent topic returns empty list.

functions.name: test_invalid_topic_rejected
functions.docstring: Topic with invalid characters should be rejected.

functions.name: test_fetch_topic_tool
functions.docstring: fetch_topic returns all messages with matching topic across all senders.

functions.name: test_broadcast_with_topic
functions.docstring: Broadcast + topic: all agents receive topic-tagged message.
